prompt: isometric pixel-art game tiles for a top-down RPG map. Each tile is a DIFFERENT large object standing FREE on a small flat patch of lush green grass — the object itself rises straight up and IS the sprite. Do NOT put it on a raised block, cube, column, box, crate or pedestal, and do NOT draw the ground as a tall raised cube: just a small low patch at the base, everything else transparent. Go for maximum variety — different shapes, species, ages and conditions, no two tiles alike. The set: 1) a tall poplar tree 2) a giant glowing toadstool 3) a cluster of white birch trees 4) a weeping willow tree 5) a weathered stone statue of a figure 6) a tall runestone monolith 7) a tall slender pine 8) a stone obelisk wrapped in ivy 9) a broad old oak tree 10) a great oak with a tree-house. cozy hand-crafted top-down RPG pixel art, rich natural texture, cohesive harmonious palette, soft directional shading, high quality game asset, transparent background
